headline: Carrier Global (CARR) Completes $440M Sale of Riello Business
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR) is one of the best stocks to invest in under $100. On July 1, Carrier Global Corporation announced the completion of the sale of its Riello business to Ariston Group for gross proceeds of approximately $440 million. This divestiture is part of Carrier’s disciplined portfolio management strategy, allowing the company to […]
